title: Unputdownable!
text: Could not stop reading. Best thriller of the year.

title: Great sci-fi
text: Loved the world-building and hard science elements.

title: Fantasy masterpiece
text: The Dragon Codex trilogy is the best fantasy I have read in years.

title: Kids love it
text: My children ask for this every bedtime. Beautiful illustrations.

title: Solid sequel
text: The Frost Blade continues the story well, though pacing dips in the middle.

title: Mind-bending
text: Marcus Chen does it again. The Pocket Universe is brilliant.

title: AI explained well
text: Neural Paths makes complex AI concepts accessible to everyone.

title: Thrilling cyber story
text: Zero Day keeps you on the edge. Vasquez is a master of suspense.

title: Poetic and beautiful
text: The Clockwork Forest is hauntingly beautiful. Dubois at her best.

title: Adorable!
text: Space Puppies is the cutest book ever. My toddler is obsessed.
